info.name: Swiss Route Api
info.description: Backend REST API for planning and tracking public transport trips in Switzerland. Built with Java + Spring Boot + PostgreSQL, it acts as a business layer on top of the [Swiss Public Transport API](https://transport.opendata.ch/docs.html), allowing registered users to search connections, save favorite routes and stations, consult station boards, and keep a history of their planned trips.

item.name: Auth Service

request.description:
# 👤 User Registration

## 📌 Endpoint

**POST**  
`http://localhost:8080/api/users/register`

---

## 📖 Description

Registers a new user in the **SwissRoute API** platform.

This endpoint allows public user registration by providing basic account information such as name, email, password, and base city.

For security purposes:

- Passwords are encrypted using **BCrypt**
    
- Passwords must comply with strong security rules before being accepted
    

---

# 🔐 Access

**Public endpoint**  
No authentication required.

---

# 📥 Request

## Request Body (JSON)

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| name | String | ✅ Yes | Full name of the user |
| email | String | ✅ Yes | Unique email address |
| password | String | ✅ Yes | User password following security requirements |
| baseCity | String | ✅ Yes | User's base city |

---

## Password Requirements

The password must contain:

- Minimum **8 characters**
    
- At least:
    
    - One uppercase letter
        
    - One lowercase letter
        
    - One number
        
    - One special character
        

### Example of a valid password

``` text
Password123!

 ```

---

### Example Request

``` http
POST /api/users/register
Content-Type: application/json

 ```

``` json
{
  "name": "Joe Doe",
  "email": "joedoe@email.com",
  "password": "Password123!",
  "baseCity": "Madrid"
}

 ```

---

# 📤 Responses

---

## ✅ 201 Created

The user was successfully registered.

### Response Body (JSON)

``` json
{
    "name": "Joe Doe",
    "email": "joedoe@email.com",
    "baseCity": "Madrid",
    "createdAt": "2026-05-20T00:04:05.836Z"
}

 ```

---

## ❌ 400 Bad Request

The request contains invalid or missing data.

### Response Body (JSON)

``` json
{
    "code": 400,
    "name": "BAD_REQUEST",
    "description": "email: Email is required; name: Name is required; password: Password is required; baseCity: Base city is required",
    "timestamp": "2026-05-20T00:05:24.008Z"
}

 ```

### Possible Causes

- Missing required fields
    
- Invalid email format
    
- Password does not meet security requirements
    
- Malformed request body
    

---

## ⚠️ 409 Conflict

The email address is already registered.

### Response Body (JSON)

``` json
{
    "code": 409,
    "name": "CONFLICT",
    "description": "Email is already in use.",
    "timestamp": "2026-05-20T00:04:38.297Z"
}

 ```

# 🔐 User Login

## 📌 Endpoint

**POST**  
`/api/users/login`

---

## 📖 Description

Authenticates a registered user and returns a **JWT access token**.

This endpoint validates the provided credentials and generates a signed token that can be used to access protected resources within the **SwissRoute API** platform.

The returned token must be included in the `Authorization` header for authenticated requests.

---

# 🔐 Access

**Public endpoint**  
No authentication required.

---

# 📥 Request

## Request Body (JSON)

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| email | String | ✅ Yes | Registered user email |
| password | String | ✅ Yes | User password |

> ⚠️ All fields are required.  
Null, empty, or blank values are not allowed. 
  

---

### Example Request

``` http
POST /api/users/login
Content-Type: application/json

 ```

``` json
{
  "email": "joedoe@email.com",
  "password": "Password123!"
}

 ```

---

# 📤 Responses

---

## ✅ 200 OK

Authentication was successful.

### Response Body (JSON)

``` json
{
    "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJkNTIxOGNiNC1iYjU3LTRlYTktYjAwMi1mMmU3MzUwNWQwNDEiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImpvZWRvZUBlbWFpbC5jb20iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzkzMjI2OTQsImV4cCI6MTc3OTMyNjI5NH0.GOV38Fwa9xDDNjqsFILinGixmLg2qLYi-_8J_ymTFrc",
    "tokenType": "Bearer",
    "expiresIn": 3600,
    "userId": "d5218cb4-bb57-4ea9-b002-f2e73505d041"
}

 ```

---

## ❌ 400 Bad Request

The request contains invalid or missing data.

### Response Body (JSON)

``` json
{
    "code": 400,
    "name": "BAD_REQUEST",
    "description": "password: Password is required; email: Email is required",
    "timestamp": "2026-05-21T00:18:38.544Z"
}

 ```

### Possible Causes

- Missing required fields
    
- Empty or blank values
    
- Malformed request body
    
- Invalid email format
    

---

## 🔐 401 Unauthorized

Authentication failed due to invalid credentials.

### Response Body (JSON)

``` json
{
    "code": 401,
    "name": "UNAUTHORIZED",
    "description": "Invalid credentials",
    "timestamp": "2026-05-21T00:19:05.308Z"
}

 ```

### Possible Causes

- Incorrect email
    
- Incorrect password
    
- User does not exist
    

---

💡 **Tip (security level 🔥):**  
The JWT token returned by this endpoint contains authenticated user information and is digitally signed to prevent tampering.

Protected endpoints should use the following header format:

``` http
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

 ```

The token expires automatically after the configured expiration time (`expiresIn`).

item.description: Registration and access to the platform
